alternative_name.description: Any alternative name by which the plasmid may be known

owner_id.description: id of the owner - by default it's your member id

length.description: The total number of base pairs (bp) in the plasmid’s DNA sequence.

usage.description: Intended or common uses of the plasmid (cloning, gene expression, etc.)

host.description: Typical host organism for the plasmid

resistance.description: Antibiotic resistance markers present in the plasmid

clone_number.description: Unique identifier or clone number associated with the plasmid

source.description: Origin or provider of the plasmid

sequence.description: The nucleotide sequence of the plasmid

description.description: A detailed description of the plasmid
